name: Fall Pumpkin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the water, bread flour, nonfat dried milk, salt, applesauce, maple syrup, brown sugar, canned pumpkin, vanilla extract, ground ginger, allspice, and pumpkin seeds.
3. Mix until well combined.
4. Add yeast to the mixture and stir until incorporated.
5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it and slicing.
